Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0900 "CAVEMANIA-5000-0900" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $5000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Cavemania.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $5000 which: 1. Sets the correct VICII settings 2. Sets the correct border and screen colours 3. Initialises colour RAM for the loading screen to display correctly 4. Displays the loading screen and waits for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game
